title: The Highest Quality Dividend Challenger Summary
text: This article presents the highest-quality Dividend Challengers, companies listed on U.S. exchanges with consistently higher annual dividend payouts for 5-9 years. The top 20 highest-quality Dividend Challengers are identified based on a quality scoring system, with Toronto-Dominion Bank, Dolby Laboratories, and Thermo Fisher Scientific making the top three. The article also highlights stocks trading at favorable valuations and offering compelling metrics for income-focused, growth-oriented, value-driven, and total-return investors.

title: Martin Marietta (MLM) to Divest Tehachapi, CA Cement Plant
text: Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) intends to sell its California-based cement plant, in line with the SOAR 2025 plan.

title: Martin Marietta to Sell Certain West Coast Cement Operations to UNACEM
text: RALEIGH, N.C., Aug. 24, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) (“Martin Marietta” or the “Company”) today announced that it has entered into a definitive agreement to sell the Tehachapi, California cement plant to UNACEM Corp S.A.A. for $317 million in cash.

title: Stock screen spotlights 20 companies whose 2024 earnings estimates have risen most sharply

title: Martin Marietta (MLM) Cheers Investors With 12% Dividend Hike
text: Martin Marietta (MLM) raises quarterly dividends to boost shareholders' value.

title: Daily Dividend Report: Martin Marietta Materials, Tyson Foods, Weyerhaeuser, J & J Snack Foods, Spirit Realty Capital

title: Martin Marietta board hikes dividend by 12%
text: Martin Marietta Materials Inc. MLM, +1.35% said Thursday its board approved a 12% hike to its dividend. The building-materials supplier said the board raised the quarterly dividend to 74 cents a share from 66 cents a share.

title: Martin Marietta Increases Quarterly Cash Dividend
text: RALEIGH, N.C., Aug. 10, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) (“Martin Marietta” or the “Company”) today announced that its Board of Directors approved a 12 percent increase in its quarterly cash dividend, raising it from $0.66 per share to $0.74 per share on the Company's outstanding common stock. This dividend, representing a cash dividend of $2.96 per share on an annualized basis, is payable September 29, 2023, to shareholders of record at the close of business on September 1, 2023.

title: 4 Analyst Favorite ‘Strong Buy' Stocks With Dividend Hikes Likely This Week
text: After years of a low interest rate environment, which has reversed in a big way over the past 16 months, many investors continue to turn to equities not only for the growth potential but also for the solid and dependable dividends that help to provide an income stream.
